trigger: AUTONOMOUS_RECOVERY_PATH_INCOMPLETE exposed by regression mission FAIL
scope: When loop escalation reaches hard_stop, forbid current strategy only — never terminal halt
Autonomously route: Council → BPB repair → alternative strategy → Builder retry → SENTRY verify → Deliver
If all approved strategies exhausted: UNSOLVED receipt + FOUNDER_ALERT.json (P0)
Prove on regression mission: produce SENTRY_CHECK_RESULT.json or honest UNSOLVED with evidence
success_criteria: Council invoked via existing gate-change API (not new review path)
At least one alternative strategy attempted without same-spec /build
Mission completes OR UNSOLVED receipt with founder alert
System never silent-stops without BP completion attempt + alert
failure_criteria: hard_stop ends loop with no recovery steps
Founder not alerted when recovery unwired or exhausted
non_goals: Declaring governance wins as mission PASS
